reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.08333333333333333 , reason:  [Array size too small; 'a' is indexed by char values (e.g., '*', '/', etc.), which can go up to 127, but original code used a[100], causing out-of-bounds access. The real issue is using int array for operator precedence without initializing all relevant entries.]
